expectations.text: The output is saved to outputs/generated/prd.json.
branchName is derived from the feature title.
expectations.evidence:
{
  "project": "Workspace Member Management",
  "branchName": "workspace-member-management",
  "description": "Workspace admins need to manage membership without editing the database directly.",
  "userStories": [
    {
      "id": "US-001",
      "title": "Add workspace member schema and audit log table",
      "description": "As a developer, I want database tables for workspace membership and audit logs so that access and changes can be stored.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Workspace members table exists",
        "Audit log table exists for membership changes",
        "Typecheck passes"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 1,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-002",
      "title": "Add backend actions for invites and access management",
      "description": "As a developer, I want backend actions for inviting, changing roles, and revoking access so that UI can trigger them.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Backend supports inviting members by email",
        "Backend supports changing roles",
        "Backend supports revoking access",
        "Backend logs changes to audit log",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Tests pass"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 2,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-003",
      "title": "Invite members UI",
      "description": "As an admin, I want to invite members by email so that they can access the workspace.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "UI has an invite member form",
        "Form submits to backend",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 3,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-004",
      "title": "Change member roles UI",
      "description": "As an admin, I want to change a member's role so that I can control their permissions.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "UI allows changing role between viewer, editor, and admin",
        "Role change is saved to backend",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 4,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-005",
      "title": "Revoke workspace access UI",
      "description": "As an admin, I want to revoke access so that former members cannot enter the workspace.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "UI allows revoking access",
        "Confirmation dialog is shown",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 5,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-006",
      "title": "View membership audit log UI",
      "description": "As an admin, I want to review recent membership changes so that I can monitor access.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Workspace settings page shows audit log of membership changes",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 6,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    }
  ]
}

expectations.text: The stories separately cover invite, role change, revoke access, and audit-log or audit-view work.

expectations.text: No story title is a horizontal layer split such as build backend or build frontend.
